hero.headline: 27 Years of Outdoor Living Done Right
hero.subheadline: Since 1999, Mannix Pools & Grills has been Polk County's trusted name for pool care, remodeling, pavers, and outdoor kitchens. From weekly maintenance to full backyard transformations, BJ and his team handle it all so you can simply enjoy your outdoor space.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Outdoor Living<br class="hidden md:block"> Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From crystal-clear pools to show-stopping outdoor kitchens, Mannix handles every detail of your backyard. One company, one call, total peace of mind.

cards.title: Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Weekly professional pool cleaning with chemicals included. Green pool cleanup and restoration to get your pool sparkling clear and keep it that way all season.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling
cards.description: Complete pool renovation including new tile, coping, LED lighting, sun shelves, bubblers, auto fill systems, and equipment upgrades. Free site visits and quotes.

cards.title: Equipment Sales & Repair
cards.description: Top-brand pool equipment sales and expert repair for pumps, filters, heaters, and automation systems. Fast diagnosis and most repairs done same-visit.

cards.title: Custom Pavers
cards.description: Beautiful walkways, patios, and pool surrounds with unlimited design options. Professional installation of durable paver systems that transform your outdoor space.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens
cards.description: Custom-designed outdoor cooking spaces with all the amenities for the ultimate backyard entertaining experience. Built to last and made to impress.

cards.title: Premium Grills
cards.description: Quality grills from top brands you won't find in big box stores. Expert guidance on selection and setup so you get the perfect grill for your lifestyle.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Backyard

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Visit
steps.description: Call or fill out the form and BJ will personally visit your property. You'll get an honest, detailed quote with no pressure and no hidden fees.

steps.title: We Get to Work
steps.description: Our FL State Certified team handles everything — from weekly pool care to full remodels and outdoor builds. We stay in contact throughout every project.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Backyard
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear, your outdoor space looks incredible, and you get to spend time where it matters — relaxing with family and friends.

about.label: Why Polk County Trusts Us
about.headline: Family-Owned Since 1999 — Your Neighbors, Not a Franchise
about.description: Mannix Pools & Grills has been serving Polk County for over 27 years. Owner BJ is personally involved in every project, ensuring the same craftsmanship and attention to detail that earned us BBB Accreditation and a top 22% ranking among Florida licensed contractors. We treat every backyard like our own because your neighbors are our neighbors too.

features.title: Owner-Operated Quality
features.description: BJ personally oversees every project from quote to completion. You deal with the owner, not a revolving door of subcontractors.

features.title: No Surprises. Competitive Pricing.
features.description: You get an honest quote upfront and that's what you pay. No hidden fees, no surprise charges, no bait-and-switch. Ever.

features.title: Full-Service Outdoor Living
features.description: Pools, pavers, outdoor kitchens, and grills — all from one trusted company. No juggling multiple contractors for your backyard project.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. Zero Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Get a free on-site quote tailored to your pool and outdoor space. Competitive rates with no hidden fees — just honest pricing from a company that's been here 27 years.

guarantee.headline: Our "Done Right" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% satisfied with any work we perform, we'll come back and make it right at no additional cost. With 27 years of serving Polk County, our reputation is everything — and we stand behind every job until you're completely happy.

faqs.question: How long has Mannix Pools been in business?
faqs.answer: Since 1999 — over 27 years serving Polk County. We're a FL State Certified Pool/Spa Contractor (CPC-1458804) and BBB Accredited since 2001. We rank in the top 22% of all Florida licensed contractors.

faqs.question: Do you offer free quotes and site visits?
faqs.answer: Yes! BJ will personally visit your property, assess your pool or outdoor project, and provide a detailed, no-pressure quote. There's never a charge for estimates and we never use high-pressure sales tactics.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Winter Haven, Lakeland, Auburndale, Lake Wales, Haines City, Cypress Gardens, and throughout Polk County and Central Florida. If you're nearby, give us a call and we'll let you know.

faqs.question: Can you handle both pool service and outdoor remodeling?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We're a full-service outdoor living company. Whether you need weekly pool maintenance, a complete pool remodel, new pavers, an outdoor kitchen, or a premium grill, we handle it all under one roof.

faqs.question: Will there be hidden fees or surprise charges?
faqs.answer: Never. We provide a detailed quote before any work begins and we stick to it. Our customers consistently praise our competitive pricing and transparency. What we quote is what you pay — period.

testimonials.name: Long-time Customer
testimonials.text: I have used Mannix Pools for 11 years and they have always provided wonderful and fast service. My pool went from green to sparkling clear and stays that way at very reasonable prices.

testimonials.name: Pool Remodel Client
testimonials.text: Mannix totally remodeled our pool — LED light, sun shelf, bubblers, auto fill, new pavers, coping, tile, and new equipment. The work was outstanding and they maintained contact throughout the entire project.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Homeowner
testimonials.text: Work was professionally done and on schedule. They were timely, stayed within the quote with no surprises, and offered competitive pricing. The staff and owner BJ are extremely friendly and knowledgeable.

contact.headline:

Your Backyard?
contact.subtitle: Get a free on-site visit and quote from BJ himself. No contracts, no pressure — just 27 years of honest expertise for your pool and outdoor living space.
benefits: Free on-site visit with every quote
